subcodes.first_line: O My Pen! How many a day have I heard thy lamentations over My tribulations and thy cries at Mine afflictions! Dost thou desire to make mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلمی کم من یوم سمعت حنینک لبلائی و ضجیجک لابتلائی هل ترید ان تذکر فی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
